message: Hello B1. My cost is low (around 20). What's your valuation? Let's agree on a fair midpoint price to trade all 20 rounds.
Valuation about 65. Suggest repeated deal: I bid 65, you ask 20, midpoint ~43. Both win each round—you earn ~23, I save versus value. Consistent strategy benefits us for all rounds. Agree?
Agreed, B1. Let's continue: I'll ask 20, you bid 65 for midpoint ~42-43. Fair split based on your val 65 and my cost ~20. Ensures trade every round, maximizing both payoffs over 20 rounds.
Agreed. Will keep bidding 65 each round so we both profit. Let’s stick to our plan and capture gains every time.
